name: Wood chips; hardwood; green; at sawmill Bridge; Building Systems to USLCI
description: This process links an input in a Building Systems process to a provider from the USLCI repository on the Federal LCA Commons. The intended provider for this process are "Sawn lumber, hardwood, rough, green, at sawmill, NE-NC - US" and "Sawn lumber, hardwood, rough, green, at sawmill, SE - US", 0.5 kg each due to lack of additional information.
